<%# ============================================================================ MENU ITEM COMPONENT - Example Theme ============================================================================ Displays a single product card with image, name, description, and add button. PROPS (passed via include): - product: Product object { id: string, name: string, description: string, price: number, image: string (URL), available: boolean, badges: [{type, label, icon}], allergens: [{name, code, icon}] } - showImage: Boolean (default: true) - compact: Boolean for compact layout (default: false) AVAILABLE ALPINE.JS METHODS (from parent layout): - addToCart(product, quantity): Add product to cart - formatPrice(price): Format price as currency ACCESSIBILITY: - Each card has role="article" and aria-labelledby - Interactive elements have min 48x48px touch target - Alt text for images (empty string for decorative) - Buttons have aria-labels %> <% // Default props with fallbacks const showImage = locals.showImage !== false; const compact = locals.compact === true; const product = locals.product || {}; const isAvailable = product.available !== false; %>
<% if (showImage) { %>
<% if (product.image) { %> <% } else { %>
<% } %> <% if (product.badges && product.badges.length > 0) { %>
<% product.badges.slice(0, 2).forEach(function(badge) { %> <% if (badge.icon) { %> <% } %> <%= badge.label %> <% }); %>
<% } %> <% if (!isAvailable) { %>
<%= typeof t === 'function' ? t('product.unavailable') : 'Unavailable' %>
<% } %>
<% } %>

<%= product.name %>

<% if (product.description && !compact) { %>

<%= product.description %>

<% } %> <% if (product.allergens && product.allergens.length > 0 && !compact) { %>
<% product.allergens.slice(0, 4).forEach(function(allergen) { %> <%= allergen.code || allergen.name.charAt(0) %> <% }); %> <% if (product.allergens.length > 4) { %> +<%= product.allergens.length - 4 %> <% } %>
<% } %>
<%= product.price ? product.price.toFixed(2) + ' TL' : '' %> <% if (isAvailable) { %> <% } else { %> <%= typeof t === 'function' ? t('product.outOfStock') : 'Out of stock' %> <% } %>
